data.title: Federal Reserve's Waller Discusses Stablecoins and Economic Risks
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller stated that while stablecoins introduce competition to the payment system, they do not pose a threat. He mentioned that no one from the Trump administration has communicated with him regarding the position of Federal Reserve Chair.

Waller highlighted that the economy is facing increased risks and emphasized the need for monetary policy to be closer to a neutral level, favoring a more accommodative policy rate. He noted that the risks of inflation rising are limited, with tariffs expected to temporarily increase inflation, which should gradually subside next year. Without the impact of tariffs, inflation is projected to approach the 2% target.

He warned that delaying interest rate cuts could lead to more aggressive measures in the future. A rate cut in July could provide room to maintain rates in subsequent meetings. If core inflation remains controlled and economic growth is sluggish, further rate cuts may be necessary, and action should not be delayed until labor market issues arise.

data.title: ADA Market Value Surpasses $30 Billion with Significant Growth
data.description: According to Odaily, recent data from Coingecko reveals that ADA's market capitalization has exceeded $30 billion, currently standing at $30.7 billion. The cryptocurrency has experienced a 24-hour increase of 11.4%.

data.title: SEC Considers 'Innovation Exemption' Following Stablecoin Legislation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chairman Paul Atkins announced that the SEC is evaluating the introduction of an 'innovation exemption' to encourage the advancement of tokenization. This consideration follows the U.S. House of Representatives' recent passage of a landmark stablecoin bill.

During a press conference, Atkins stated that SEC staff are exploring potential adjustments within the existing regulatory framework to support tokenization. These adjustments may include establishing an 'innovation exemption' to allow new trading methods and facilitate the development of other essential components within the tokenized securities ecosystem.

data.title: U.S. SEC Chairman Paul Atkins: Considering the introduction of a cryptocurrency innovation exemption policy to advance tokenization
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Paul Atkins, chairman of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, said that after the U.S. House of Representatives passed the landmark stablecoin bill earlier this Thursday, the SEC is weighing whether to launch an "innovation exemption" to encourage the market to advance the tokenization process. He said at a press conference: "SEC staff are considering other possible adjustments to promote the development of tokenization under the existing regulatory framework, including the establishment of an innovation exemption to allow new trading methods and promote the construction of other key components in the tokenized securities ecosystem through more targeted exemptions."

data.title: White House Press Secretary: Trump supports the minimum tax exemption policy for cryptocurrencies and will promote legislation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The White House press secretary said that President Trump confirmed that he supports the "minimum tax exemption" policy for Bitcoin and cryptocurrencies, and said that he will continue to promote legislation to achieve this goal. (Cointelegraph) Note: Minimum tax exemption means that when the amount or income of a transaction is very small (below a set "minimum limit"), the tax authorities will not levy taxes.

data.title: Nonprofit development organization Argot Collective sells 600 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Embers monitoring, Argot Collective, a non-profit development organization that received 7,000 ETH operating funds from the Ethereum Foundation, continued to sell 600 ETH in exchange for 2.06 million USDC 5 hours ago.

data.title: Trump Supports Tax Exemption Policy for Bitcoin and Cryptocurrencies
data.description: According to Odaily, the White House Press Secretary has confirmed that U.S. President Donald Trump supports a policy for tax exemption on minimal transactions involving Bitcoin and cryptocurrencies. The administration plans to continue pursuing legislative measures to achieve this goal. The tax exemption policy refers to not taxing transactions or earnings that fall below a specified 'minimum threshold.'

data.title: A whale/institution withdrew 14,982 ETH from Kraken, about 51.29 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember's monitoring, an unknown whale/institution that continues to withdraw ETH from Kraken continued to withdraw 14,982 ETH (worth approximately $51.29 million) from Kraken 4 hours ago.
Since the 10th, this address has withdrawn a total of 103,274 ETH (worth approximately $298 million) from Kraken, with an average purchase price of $2,885, and currently has a floating profit of $63 million.

data.title: Is That Right? US Senator Says Crypto Could ‘Blow Up’ Financial System
data.description:
A bill moving through Congress could reshape how big companies sell their shares. Senator Elizabeth Warren of Massachusetts warned that the CLARITY Act might let firms dodge long‑standing rules. Related Reading: If You’re Wealthy, 1 Bitcoin Should Already Be In Your Wallet, Expert Says Based on reports, the measure would shift certain tokens onto a “mature” blockchain and hand oversight to the CFTC instead of the SEC. Warren Warns Of A Regulatory Loophole According to Warren, the bill’s text would let any company listed on the NYSE put its stock on a qualifying blockchain
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/is-that-right-us-senator-says-crypto-could-blow-up-financial-system/

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, whales are accumulating Ethereum in large quantities. Among them, the whale with the address starting with 0x52e has spent 36.5 million USDT and purchased 10,587.4 ETH at an average price of $3,448 per ETH; the whale with the address starting with 0xdfc has spent 9.98 million USDT and purchased 2,895 ETH at an average price of $3,448 per ETH.

data.title: Meta Platforms Appoints New Threads Platform Head Amid AI Talent Acquisition
data.description:
According to PANews, Meta Platforms has appointed Connor Hayes as the head of its Threads platform. This move comes as the company continues to strengthen its leadership team.

In addition to this appointment, Meta Platforms has reportedly recruited two AI experts from Apple, further enhancing its capabilities in artificial intelligence. This strategic acquisition is part of Meta's ongoing efforts to bolster its technological expertise and innovation in the competitive tech industry.

data.title: Ripple co-founder transfers $26 million in XRP to Coinbase
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: As XRP approaches its all-time high, Ripple co-founder and executive chairman Chris Larsen has transferred $26 million worth of XRP to Coinbase. (Decrypt)
